qualifications.name: Diploma in Practical Music
notes: Aggregate note: No aggregate average stated; NSC subject minimums apply.
Admission score type: Aggregated average.
Faculty aggregate note: Excluding Life Orientation.

Extended curriculum information: {"available": true, "applies_to": "Programmes marked with #", "duration": "4 years", "note": "Students are selected for extended curriculum programmes at the discretion of the Faculty"}.

Additional Stellenbosch requirements: National Senior Certificate with at least 40% in each of four school subjects, excluding Life Orientation; Practical standard in main instrument or singing equivalent to Grade VII classical music; Theoretical knowledge equivalent to Grade III or IV theory examination.
